g.text: 3000+ stores AU + NZ | Windows VM → RHEL OpenShift MicroShift | Zero-touch fleet

g.text: Workloads running on every edge node
Containerised on MicroShift / SNO | deployed via ArgoCD GitOps | managed by ACM

sendPrompt('How does a cold chain monitoring workload run on a store edge node?')

SNO per region | aggregates ~500 stores | local Thanos + Loki relay | SD-WAN POP

g.text: WooliesX central hub — Bella Vista DC / Azure
OCP cluster | ACM multicluster hub | ArgoCD | Vault | Thanos | Loki | MCP AI
